name: Donald Trump
quote: The big wave is yet to come. Iran ignored our warnings over its nuclear program. I will never allow the world's number one sponsor of terror to have a nuclear weapon.

name: Pete Hegseth
quote: The most lethal, most complex, and most-precision aerial operation in history. This is not Iraq. This is not endless.

name: Ali Larijani
quote: Iran will not negotiate with the US. The enemy is trying to plunder and disintegrate our nation. Any secessionist movement will face severe consequences.

name: IRGC Statement
quote: The enemy must know that its happy days are over, and it will no longer be safe anywhere in the world, even in its own homes.

name: Tim Kaine
quote: The Constitution says we are not supposed to be at war without a vote of Congress.

name: António Guterres
quote: Condemned both US-Israeli strikes and Iran's retaliatory attacks. The strikes squandered an opportunity for diplomacy.

name: Thomas Massie
quote: I am opposed to this War. This is not "America First."

name: Erdoğan
quote: US-Israeli attacks violate Iran's sovereignty. However, Iran's retaliatory attacks on Gulf countries are also unacceptable.
